summary: The diff modifies Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx to use new logo image paths, but uses the original uploaded filenames (/assets/CETA Logo-Photoroom-1.png and /assets/HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-1.png) instead of the required canonical static asset paths (/assets/generated/hope-logo.png and /assets/generated/ceta-logo.png). Additionally, no new static asset files were added at the required paths.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded HOPE logo as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hope-logo.png and replace every existing HOPE logo image reference in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx with this new file path.
missing_requirements.reason: No new file was added at frontend/public/assets/generated/hope-logo.png (ADDED FILES: none). All three components reference /assets/HOPE Logo_0-Photoroom-1.png instead of /assets/generated/hope-logo.png.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the uploaded CETA logo as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/ceta-logo.png and replace every existing CETA logo image reference in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx with this new file path.
missing_requirements.reason: No new file was added at frontend/public/assets/generated/ceta-logo.png (ADDED FILES: none). All three components reference /assets/CETA Logo-Photoroom-1.png instead of /assets/generated/ceta-logo.png.
